message:
Thanks! Your photo is now showing on the Selah display!

Your subject line becomes the caption shown under the photo.

Tip: To save a photo for a special date (a birthday or anniversary), put the date in the subject line:

  Subject: Happy Birthday, Mom Sept 4       (shows EVERY year on that date)
  Subject: Merry Christmas 2026-12-25        (add a year to show it once)

Send as many photos as you like!

Thanks! Your photo is saved to display on {date}.

It will appear first thing that morning, alongside everyone's greetings and that day's memories. Your subject line is the caption shown under the photo.

Tip: To show a photo right away instead, just leave the date out of the subject line.

Thanks for your photo! It's been added to the Selah display.

Here's how it works:

  • Your subject line becomes the caption shown under the photo
  • To save a photo for a date, put it in the subject (e.g. "Happy Birthday, Dad June 20") — with no year it shows EVERY year; add a year ("2026-12-25") to show it once
  • To display now, just send without a date
  • JPG, PNG, and MP4/MOV videos all work

Keep the photos coming!
